title: 4 Preparing ICBC Agents芒聙聶 Deposits
body_text:
4	Preparing ICBC Agents芒聙聶 Deposits
4.1	Preparing an ICBC Agent芒聙聶s Deposit
ICBC agents prepare deposits as follows:
Separate cheques and cash.
Stamp the upper right quadrant of the back of each cheque in black ink with their ICBC Agent Stamp. See Figure 1. The stamp provides the agent芒聙聶s ICBC number and space for the agent to record the insured individual芒聙聶s driver芒聙聶s license number, phone number, claim number, vehicle number, and customer service number.
Note: 	ICBC agents order endorsement stamps directly from ICBC.
Figure 1: ICBC Endorsement Stamp
Complete ICBC Deposit Slip, Form 1126, for each deposit as follows. See Figure 2.
芒聭
Enter your financial institution芒聙聶s name, transit number, and the deposit date.
芒聭隆
Agent Name
芒聙聯
Enter the agent芒聙聶s name.
芒聭垄
Agent No.
芒聙聯
Enter the agent芒聙聶s number.
芒聭拢
Account No.
芒聙聯 Enter the ICBC Agent account number.
芒聭陇
Deposit Details
芒聙聯 Enter the value of all cash and/or individual cheques and verify the deposit total.
Note:	The Deposit Total field automatically populates.
芒聭楼
Depositor芒聙聶s Signature
芒聙聯 Sign the form. The person preparing the deposit must be the signatory.
Figure 2: ICBC Deposit Slip, Form 1126
Important
:	The agent must provide an ICBC Deposit Slip because it includes information required to complete the ICBC Deposit Slip on ServiceNow.

Form 1126
